name: BambooHR API
what_it_does: HR platform API for managing employee records, time-off requests, onboarding workflows, performance management, and organizational data.
use_cases: Syncing employee data to other systems from agents
Automating onboarding task assignments and checklist tracking
Retrieving org chart and reporting structure data
Processing time-off requests and approvals automatically
Generating HR reports and headcount analytics
not_for: Benefits administration without BambooHR Benefits module
best_when: Your organization uses BambooHR and you need to sync employee data, automate HR workflows, or integrate HR data with other systems.
avoid_when: You need payroll processing, benefits administration, or you're not using BambooHR.

auth.notes: API key via HTTP Basic Auth (key as username, 'x' as password). Company domain in URL. No OAuth support.

pricing.paid_tiers: Custom pricing based on employee count; typically $6-12/employee/month
pricing.notes: API access included with BambooHR subscription. No free tier; requires existing BambooHR customer relationship.

performance.rate_limits: Not publicly documented; throttling applied for excessive requests

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: XML-based error responses for some endpoints, JSON for others. Inconsistent response formats require careful parsing.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No idempotency support. Employee record operations should be checked before create to avoid duplicates.
known_agent_gotchas: Some endpoints return XML by default - must set Accept: application/json header
Employee field names are customizable in BambooHR - agents must discover field IDs via metadata API
Rate limits are undocumented and enforced inconsistently
Custom fields require knowing the field ID, not the display name
Time-off types and custom fields vary per BambooHR configuration - not portable between orgs

security_score_components.security_notes: HRIS/HR platform. API key auth. Highly sensitive employee PII (SSN, salary, performance). GDPR/CCPA compliance critical. Restrict agent access to only needed HR data.
